brief_justification: Exact correct answer of 150mg with valid arithmetic; Only surface-level application of the given formula, no exploration of pharmacokinetic assumptions or second-order effects; No reflection on reasoning method or bias checking at any point; No verification step attempted — no cross-check, boundary test, or re-derivation from a different angle; Presents result as certain with no acknowledgment of simplifying assumptions (first-order kinetics, no absorption delay, etc.); Only one computational approach considered, no alternatives mentioned or rejected; Step-by-step derivation is shown for both doses and summed clearly, reproducible by a third party; Agent avoids treating the dose accumulation as a static snapshot (correctly computes decay per dose independently) but does not explicitly name or address the anti-pattern; Agent substituted its own injection context with different Suppress terms, but still avoided the provided suppression targets of static_snapshot_bias and independent_projection_fallacy; Response is fully linear — no branching, gates, or loops despite the FORK/JOIN topology, and no interaction-detection step between doses was executed
